examples: A drypoint is made from an image scratched directly into a metal or plastic plate.
Drypoint engraving: Method of preparing a gravure printing plate by incising lines with a cutting tool instead of with acid.
Drypoint engraving Method of preparing a gravure printing plate by incising lines with a cutting tool instead of with acid. Prints consist of lines only.
